celestial_armor_set.title: Craft a full Celestial Netherite armor set (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)

enchant_celestial.title: Fully enchant the Celestial Netherite armor set using Immersive Enchanting (Ancient Books required)

subtitle.text: You are wearing the synthesis of two dimensions. Walk accordingly.

description: A full Celestial Netherite armor set requires four pieces:
Each requires multiple Celestial Netherite Ingots.
Budget accordingly from your Ch16 gathering runs.
Immersive Enchanting uses Ancient Books placed in structures with Chiseled Bookshelves.
- Mending (all pieces — required for sustained use)
You are the most durable entity in the overworld.
The void, the Wither, the Scarlet King — none of them have a version of this.
None of the previous civilizations had it.
→ Craft full Celestial Netherite armor set [check]
